statement: The full-Phi active source response has rank two on H_delta; equivalently E_active is injective on the active source spectral space.

activeSourceRankConsequenceStatus.reason: Therefore E_active is injective on H_delta.

proof: Import the full-theta source noncollapse interval theorem.
Read off the active response rank/noncollapse conclusion.
